parameters.algorithm: Effect algorithm (Mosaic, Seq, Glide, Haze, Tunnel, Strum, Blocks, Interrupt, Arp, Pattern, Warp)
parameters.variation: Algorithm variation (A/B/C/D) — changes internal routing and behavior
parameters.activity: Algorithm-specific macro — generally more or less of what the effect does
parameters.repeats: Algorithm-specific macro — generally controls sustain and tail length
parameters.shape: Grain envelope shape — Ramp / Square / Triangle / Random zones
parameters.filter: Lowpass filter cutoff (fully CW = wide open)
parameters.hold: Freeze current wet output and loop indefinitely
